name: Cheese-Stuffed Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cheese. Seed and chop the chile pepper. Slice the tomato. Set aside.
2. Shape the beef into 8 thin patties. Add 1/4 of the cheese mixture in the center of 4 of the patties. Top with remaining patties and pinch to seal.
3. Toast the bread. Heat oil in a frying pan. Cook the hamburgers for 6-8 minutes over medium heat until medium rare. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Place cooked hamburgers on the toast. Top with tomato slices and another slice of toast.
